pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java source and target compatibility to version 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code uses Java 21 features or requires JDK 21 runtime; compiling with source/target 11 would fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JUnit Jupiter API dependency for modern test annotations.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests use JUnit 5 annotations (e.g., @Test, @BeforeEach) which are not present in JUnit 4; compilation fails without this dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JUnit Jupiter Engine dependency to execute JUnit 5 tests.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven Surefire cannot discover or run JUnit 5 tests without the engine on the classpath; tests will be skipped or fail at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Mockito Core dependency for mocking in tests.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests use Mockito annotations or methods; compilation fails if the library is missing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Mockito JUnit Jupiter integration for test lifecycle support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests use @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class) or similar; runtime fails without this integration.
Surefire 3.x is required for proper JUnit 5 support and Java 21 compatibility in test execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM args to open java.base/java.lang for reflection.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mockito/ByteBuddy requires reflective access to internal JDK classes which are encapsulated in Java 21; tests fail with InaccessibleObjectException without this.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update main class package to code.tax.TaxApp.
pom.xml.why_exists: Class moved to new package structure; old main class reference would cause NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.
